zh.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Muschamp於大約1225年出生在英國諾圖波藍德武爾時，她的父親Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV39歲，母親Isabel de Hardon31歲。她於大約1244年與Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1255年3月20日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Muschamp于大约1225年出生在英国諾圖波藍德武爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV39岁，母亲Isabel de Hardon31岁。她于大约1244年与Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1255年3月20日在英国苏格兰培爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muschamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North and South Muskham (Notts), recorded in gallicized forms such as Muscamp and Muschamp from the 12th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Muschamp was born about 1225, in Wooler, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV, was 39 and her mother, Isabel de Hardon, was 31. She married Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn about 1244, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 20 March 1255, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Muschamp est née environ 1225, à Wooler, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Hardon, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn environ 1244, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1255, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Muschamp um 1225 in Wooler, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV 39 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Hardon 31. Sie hat um 1244 in Schottland, United Kingdom Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1255 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Muschamp è nata il circa 1225 nel Wooler, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Hardon, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn circa 1244, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1255, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Muschampが約1225年にイギリスノースウンバーランドウラーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IVは39歳，母Isabel de Hardonは31歳であった。約1244年にイギリススコットランドでMalise 5th Earl of Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1255年3月20日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Muschamp(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 노르스벌랜드 보러에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Hardon(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1244년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1255년 3월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Muschamp nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Hardon, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn aproximadamente 1244, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1255, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Muschamp родилась около 1225 г. в местности вулир, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Hardon, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn около 1244 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 марта 1255 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Muschamp nació aproximadamente 1225, en Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabel de Hardon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn aproximadamente 1244, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1255, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
